topics.title: Prompt Engineering
topics.description: Techniques and best practices for crafting effective prompts for Claude, including system prompts, few-shot examples, chain-of-thought reasoning, and structured outputs.

subtopics.title: System Prompts
subtopics.description: Design and structure of system prompts that define Claude's role, constraints, and behavior patterns.

subtopics.title: System Prompt Structure
subtopics.description: Best practices for structuring system prompts including role definition, goals, constraints, 'if unsure' instructions, and output format specifications.

subtopics.title: XML Tags and Formatting
subtopics.description: Using XML tags to structure prompts, wrap documents, and organize multi-document inputs for improved response quality.

subtopics.title: Few-Shot Prompting
subtopics.description: Providing examples to guide Claude's responses, including one-shot, few-shot, and edge case examples.

subtopics.title: Example Design and Selection
subtopics.description: Crafting realistic, specific examples including edge cases and challenging scenarios to improve model output quality.

subtopics.title: Negative Examples
subtopics.description: Using negative examples to define boundaries and show Claude what not to do.

subtopics.title: Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
subtopics.description: Techniques for encouraging step-by-step reasoning to improve accuracy and transparency.

subtopics.title: Thinking Tags Pattern
subtopics.description: Using thinking tags to encourage Claude to reason through problems before providing final answers.

subtopics.title: Extended Thinking Mode
subtopics.description: API features for extended thinking, token management for thinking blocks, and when to use extended reasoning.

subtopics.title: Prompt Chaining
subtopics.description: Breaking complex tasks into subtasks and using outputs from one prompt as inputs for the next.

subtopics.title: Task Decomposition
subtopics.description: Strategies for breaking complex tasks into manageable subtasks for improved accuracy and debuggability.

topics.title: Tool Use and Function Calling
topics.description: Enabling Claude to interact with external tools and functions, including tool definitions, execution patterns, and error handling.

subtopics.title: Tool Definitions
subtopics.description: Defining tools with names, descriptions, and JSON schemas for input parameters.

subtopics.title: Input Schema Design
subtopics.description: Creating JSON schemas for tool inputs including properties, required fields, enums, and descriptions.

subtopics.title: Strict Tool Use
subtopics.description: Using strict: true for guaranteed schema validation and eliminating type mismatches in tool inputs.

subtopics.title: Client Tools
subtopics.description: Tools that execute on client systems, including the tool use workflow and result handling.

subtopics.title: Tool Execution Flow
subtopics.description: The complete workflow from tool definition to execution and result return, including stop_reason handling.

subtopics.title: Tool Results
subtopics.description: Formatting and returning tool_result content blocks to Claude for response synthesis.

subtopics.title: Server Tools
subtopics.description: Anthropic-provided tools that execute on Anthropic servers, including web search and web fetch.

subtopics.title: Web Search Tool
subtopics.description: Using the web_search server tool for real-time information retrieval.

subtopics.title: Handling pause_turn
subtopics.description: Managing pause_turn stop reason when server-side sampling loops reach iteration limits.

subtopics.title: Parallel Tool Use
subtopics.description: Handling multiple simultaneous tool calls and returning results correctly.

subtopics.title: Parallel Result Formatting
subtopics.description: Correctly formatting multiple tool_result blocks in a single user message for parallel tool calls.

subtopics.title: Tool Choice Control
subtopics.description: Controlling when and how Claude uses tools via tool_choice parameter.

subtopics.title: Tool Choice Modes
subtopics.description: Understanding auto, none, any, and specific tool choice modes and their effects on Claude's behavior.

topics.title: Agentic Patterns
topics.description: Building autonomous agents with Claude, including agent loops, multi-agent orchestration, and context management.

subtopics.title: Agent Loops
subtopics.description: Core patterns for building autonomous agent loops that iterate until task completion.

subtopics.title: Basic Agent Loop Pattern
subtopics.description: The fundamental while-loop pattern where agents receive tasks, pick tools, execute, and evaluate results.

subtopics.title: Long-Running Agents
subtopics.description: Patterns for agents that run across multiple sessions, including initialization and session continuity.

subtopics.title: Multi-Agent Orchestration
subtopics.description: Coordinating multiple Claude instances working together on complex tasks.

subtopics.title: Agent Teams
subtopics.description: Anthropic's native agent teams feature for coordinating multiple Claude Code instances with team leads and teammates.

subtopics.title: Subagents vs Teams
subtopics.description: Understanding when to use subagents (single session, isolated reports) versus agent teams (direct collaboration).

subtopics.title: Role Specialization
subtopics.description: Designing specialized agents for different reasoning modes: architecture, implementation, testing, documentation.

subtopics.title: Claude Agent SDK
subtopics.description: Using Anthropic's Agent SDK for building production agent applications.

subtopics.title: Task Tool for Spawning
subtopics.description: Using the Task tool to spawn sub-agents with isolated contexts and controlled tool access.

topics.title: Context Window Management

subtopics.title: Token Limits
subtopics.description: Understanding context window sizes across models and tiers.

subtopics.title: Context Window Sizes
subtopics.description: Standard 200K context, 500K for Sonnet 4.5 Enterprise, and 1M beta for Opus 4.6 (Tier 4 only).

subtopics.title: Token Counting API
subtopics.description: Using the token counting endpoint to estimate usage before sending requests.

subtopics.title: Prompt Caching
subtopics.description: Caching static content to reduce costs and improve throughput.

subtopics.title: Cache Implementation
subtopics.description: Setting up prompt caching with 1-hour TTL, cache hit optimization, and cost savings (90% discount on cached content).

subtopics.description: Understanding that cached tokens don't count toward ITPM limits, enabling 5-10x effective throughput.

subtopics.description: Using server-side summarization to condense earlier conversation parts for long-running conversations.

subtopics.description: Enabling and using compaction beta for Opus 4.6 to extend conversations beyond context limits.

subtopics.title: Context Awareness
subtopics.description: Model features for tracking remaining token budget during conversations.

subtopics.description: How Claude Sonnet 4.6, Sonnet 4.5, and Haiku 4.5 track and manage remaining context window capacity.

subtopics.title: CAI Methodology
subtopics.description: The two-phase training process: supervised learning with self-critique and RLAIF with AI-generated preferences.

subtopics.title: The 2026 Constitution
subtopics.description: Understanding the 23,000-word reason-based constitution with four primary pillars for decision-making.

subtopics.description: Modern RLHF systems collecting feedback across helpfulness, harmlessness, honesty, and task-specific criteria.

subtopics.title: Usage Policies
subtopics.description: Anthropic's acceptable use policies and restrictions.

subtopics.description: Prohibited uses including mass surveillance, autonomous weapons, and other restricted applications.

subtopics.title: Jailbreak Prevention

subtopics.description: Anthropic's system for detecting and blocking jailbreak attempts, tested against 3,000+ hours of red teaming.
